description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic with some Hebrew. The names are missing, except part of the sender's name at upper right. Dating: Likely 12th or 13th century. The sender is hoping to take advantage of the addressee's prior offer to help his son when the son comes to Fustat. On verso there are some Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית עם עברית; השולח מקווה לנצל הצעת הנמען לסייע לבנו בבואו לפסטאט
